title: SHC PVZ ZenGarden
description: Utility Mod with a Plants vs Zombies Thematic!
body:
**This it's the first mod I've made! :D**

This mod adds plants and other stuff related to the Plants vs Zombies franchise, but more that just alowing you to to plant a defense against any zombie, this is an utility mod to make your cubic life a little bit more

[[ Geckolib Required ]](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib)

**Other Information:**

**Mod Game Rules:**

-Seedpacket Cooldown (Default True): Make seedpackets have cooldown after use.

-Starter Kit (Default True): Give a Zengarden Guide & unlock some basic recipes to all the new players.

-Utility Plants Griefing (Default: False): Allow utility plants to damage the terrain.


**Q. Will you add the zombies?**

A. ZenGarden is only focused on the plants from all the Pvz franchise, the zombies will Have their own Mod in the future.

**Q. Can I use this on my modpack?**

A.Yes, I'm more that happy if you want to use this in your modpack! :D

**Q. Will you update this in the future?**

A. Yes, I have some stuff planned for the development of this mod.
